summary: Monte Carlo forecast for BTC price 8 days out from $93,883. Mixture model with 3 volatility regimes.
content: Current price: $93,883 (Jan 5 close). 30-day observed daily vol: 1.39% (annualized 26.5%). This is a low-vol period for BTC. Used 3-regime mixture: 60% current calm (1.4%), 25% normal BTC (3%), 15% high vol (5%). Median ~$94,700. P10=$87,192, P90=$102,262. Recent trend slightly upward (price rose from ~$87k to ~$94k over past week).
